title: rosa × andegavensis f. germanica
intro: Rosa × andegavensis f. germanica is a subspecies of hybrid rose, known for its fragrance and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its high content of salicylic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa × andegavensis f. germanica include relief from pain, fever reduction, and skin irritations, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
